steps.title: Add equations to eliminate y
steps.content:
The coefficients of $y$ are \$5$ and $-5$ (opposites), so adding the equations eliminates $y$:

$$5y + (-5y) = (10x + 11) + (5x - 21)$$
$$0 = 15x - 10$$
$$15x = 10$$

steps.title: Calculate 30x from 15x = 10
steps.content:
The problem asks for $30x$, not just $x$. Since $15x = 10$, we can find $30x$ by multiplying both sides by 2:

$$30x = 2(15x) = 2(10) = 20$$

The answer is 20.
